2604.21335.title: Sub-Token Routing in LoRA for Adaptation and Query-Aware KV Compression
2604.21335.paper_summary: Sub-token routing offers a finer control axis for transformer efficiency than the coarse units used in most prior work, such as tokens, pages, heads, or layers. In this paper, we study routing within a token representation itself in LoRA-adapted transformers. The motivation is that a relevant token need not be internally uniform: under a retention budget, preserved value groups are distributed unevenly both across tokens and within tokens, which suggests that KV compression need not be an all-or-nothing decision at token level. We study this fine-grained routing mechanism in two settings. For compression-aware language modeling, we introduce a query-independent design that combines routed subspace LoRA with value-group routing on the KV path. For downstream-task-preserving KV compression, we introduce a query-aware design in which a predictor-based selector allocates a global retention budget over context-token/value-group pairs using query-conditioned relevance. Experiments show that the query-independent design improves the quality-compression tradeoff for language modeling, while the query-aware design preserves downstream behavior under reduced KV budgets. We further examine the relation between token-level and sub-token-level query-aware routing, and show that they form complementary compression axes: token-level methods determine which tokens survive globally, while sub-token routing determines how the surviving tokens are compressed internally.
2604.21335.paper_summary_zh: 子標記路由提供了比大多數先前工作中使用的粗略單位（如標記、頁面、頭或層）更細緻的控制軸，以提高Transformer的效率。在本文中，我們研究了在LoRA適應的Transformer中，標記表示內部的路由。其動機在於，相關的標記不必在內部保持一致：在保留預算下，保留的值組在標記之間和標記內部的分佈是不均勻的，這表明KV壓縮不必在標記層面上是全有或全無的決策。我們在兩個設置中研究這一細粒度的路由機制。對於壓縮感知的語言建模，我們引入了一種查詢獨立設計，將路由的子空間LoRA與KV路徑上的值組路由結合起來。對於下游任務保留的KV壓縮，我們引入了一種查詢感知設計，其中基於預測器的選擇器使用查詢條件的相關性在上下文標記/值組對上分配全局保留預算。實驗表明，查詢獨立設計改善了語言建模的質量-壓縮權衡，而查詢感知設計則在減少的KV預算下保留了下游行為。我們進一步檢查了標記層級和子標記層級查詢感知路由之間的關係，並顯示它們形成了互補的壓縮軸：標記層級方法決定哪些標記在全局上存活，而子標記路由則決定存活的標記如何在內部被壓縮。
2604.21335.author: Wei Jiang et.al.
